zh.Naaldwijk, South Holland, Netherlands: 荷蘭-拉藍德納阿爾德維可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Bartholomeus van Voorne van Naaldwijk於大約1170年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德奧斯特賀內時，他的父親Dirk I van Voorne37歲，母親Hadewich van Naaldwijk44歲。他於大約1189年與Halewijne Van Egmond結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於從1215年到1220年在荷蘭-拉藍德維利特。

zh-hans.Naaldwijk, South Holland, Netherlands: 荷兰-拉藍德納阿爾德維可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bartholomeus van Voorne van Naaldwijk于大约1170年出生在荷兰-拉藍德奧斯特賀內时，他的父亲Dirk I van Voorne37岁，母亲Hadewich van Naaldwijk44岁。他于大约1189年与Halewijne Van Egmond结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于从1215年到1220年在荷兰-拉藍德維利特。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Bartholomeus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of New Testament origin, the name of an apostle mentioned in all the synoptic gospels (Matthew, Mark, and Luke) and in the Acts of the Apostles. It is an Aramaic formation meaning ‘son of Talmai’, and has been assumed by many scholars to be a byname of the apostle Nathaniel . Talmai is a Hebrew name, said to mean ‘abounding in furrows’ (Numbers 13:22).

en.lifeSummary: When Bartholomeus van Voorne van Naaldwijk was born about 1170, in Oostvoorne, South Holland, Netherlands, his father, Dirk I van Voorne, was 37 and his mother, Hadewich van Naaldwijk, was 44. He married Halewijne Van Egmond about 1189. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died from 1215 to 1220, in Heenvliet, South Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bartholomeus van Voorne van Naaldwijk est né environ 1170, à Oostvoorne, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Dirk I van Voorne, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Hadewich van Naaldwijk, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Halewijne Van Egmond environ 1189. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé du 1215 au 1220, à Heenvliet, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bartholomeus van Voorne van Naaldwijk um 1170 in Oostvoorne, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dirk I van Voorne 37 und seine Mutter Hadewich van Naaldwijk 44. Er hat um 1189 Halewijne Van Egmond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb von 1215 bis 1220 in Heenvliet, Südholland, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bartholomeus van Voorne van Naaldwijk è nato il circa 1170 nel Oostvoorne, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Dirk I van Voorne, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Hadewich van Naaldwijk, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Halewijne Van Egmond circa 1189. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì da 1215 a 1220, nel Heenvliet, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.Naaldwijk, South Holland, Netherlands: オランダズイド-hオランドナアルドウィジク
ja.Oostvoorne, Holland, Netherlands: オランダホーランドオオストボオルン
ja.Heenvliet, South Holland, Netherlands: オランダズイド-hオランドヒーンvリート
ja.Oostvoorne, South Holland, Netherlands: オランダズイド-hオランド
ja.lifeSummary: Bartholomeus van Voorne van Naaldwijkが約1170年にオランダズイド-hオランドオオストボオルンで生まれた時，父Dirk I van Voorneは37歳，母Hadewich van Naaldwijkは44歳であった。約1189年にHalewijne Van Egmondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼はから1215年まで1220年にオランダズイド-hオランドヒーンvリートで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bartholomeus van Voorne van Naaldwijk(이)가 대략 1170년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 스트보른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dirk I van Voorne(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Hadewich van Naaldwijk(은)는 44세였다. 그는 대략 1189년 Halewijne Van Egmond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1215년 부터 1220년 까지 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 힌블리트에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bartholomeus van Voorne van Naaldwijk nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Oostvoorne, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Dirk I van Voorne, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Hadewich van Naaldwijk, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Halewijne Van Egmond aproximadamente 1189. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu de 1215 a 1220, em Heenvliet, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bartholomeus van Voorne van Naaldwijk родился около 1170 г. в местности уствурн, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Dirk I van Voorne было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Hadewich van Naaldwijk, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Halewijne Van Egmond около 1189 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер с 1215 по 1220 в местности хинвльет, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bartholomeus van Voorne van Naaldwijk nació aproximadamente 1170, en Oostvoorne, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Dirk I van Voorne, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Hadewich van Naaldwijk, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Halewijne Van Egmond aproximadamente 1189. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió desde 1215 hasta 1220, en Heenvliet, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos.
